name: Pendo
description: Pendo is a product experience platform. Track feature usage, collect user feedback, create in-app guides, and analyze product analytics to drive adoption and retention.

capabilities.name: track_event
capabilities.description: Send a custom track event for product analytics.

capabilities.name: get_feature_usage
capabilities.description: Get usage analytics for a specific feature or page.

capabilities.name: list_guides
capabilities.description: List all in-app guides with their status and targeting.

capabilities.name: get_visitor
capabilities.description: Retrieve visitor (user) details with metadata and activity.

capabilities.name: list_pages
capabilities.description: List all tracked pages with view counts and analytics.

capabilities.name: aggregate_events
capabilities.description: Run aggregation queries on event data for custom analytics.
